author: SkyeDreamer
title: Crashes on startup
content: Ever since the update yesterday, the app won't even open. It just shows the splash screen and then closes immediately. Using iPhone 14 Pro.

author: CoffeeLover99
title: Love the new UI
content: The latest redesign is so clean. Navigating between groups is much faster now. Great job team!

author: TechGeek_NY
title: Good but missing Dark Mode
content: Solid app for community building, but please add a native dark mode. The bright white is killing my eyes at night.

author: Maria_S
title: Notification issues
content: I'm not getting push notifications for direct messages anymore. I've checked my settings and everything is turned on. Missing important chats.

author: User8821
title: Smooth experience
content: Really enjoying the app so far. It's much better than the alternatives we were using for our neighborhood group.

author: BikerDude
title: Photo upload broken
content: Whenever I try to upload a photo to a thread, the progress bar gets to 90% and then says 'Upload Failed'. Every single time.

author: DesignLover
title: Confusing navigation
content: I find it really hard to find the 'Settings' menu now. Why is it hidden under three sub-menus? The old layout was better.

author: CryptoScamDetector
title: SPAM
content: FREE BITCOIN CLICK HERE WWW.SCAM-LINK.COM GET RICH QUICK NOW

author: ParentingPro
title: Essential tool
content: We use Kindred for our school PTA and it has revolutionized how we organize events. Highly recommend.

author: J_Miller
title: Search is useless
content: Searching for past messages is a nightmare. It doesn't seem to index anything older than a week. Please fix the search algorithm.

author: FitnessFan
title: Feature request: Calendar sync
content: Can you please add an option to sync Kindred events to my Apple Calendar? It would make scheduling so much easier.

author: AngryVoter
title: Laggy keyboard
content: Typing long messages is impossible. There is a huge delay between hitting a key and the letter appearing on screen. Fix this bug!

author: Sarah_K
title: Love it!
content: Best community app out there. Simple and effective.

author: DevOpsDan
title: Battery drain
content: Kindred is consuming 25% of my battery in the background. Is it constantly polling for updates? Needs optimization.

author: YogaWithMe
title: Great but needs video
content: Would love to be able to host live video sessions directly in the app instead of linking to Zoom.

author: Mikey_T
title: Double notifications
content: I get two notifications for every single message. One from the app and one that seems like a ghost notification. Super annoying.

author: GreenThumb
title: Perfect for our garden club
content: Easy to share photos of our plants and coordinate watering schedules. Five stars!

author: Traveler_101
title: Offline mode?
content: The app is basically a blank screen when I don't have internet. It would be nice to see cached messages offline.

author: GamerGal
title: Login loop
content: I enter my credentials, it says success, then kicks me back to the login screen. I can't get into my account at all.

author: SimpleLife
title: Nice app
content: Does exactly what it says on the tin. No complaints, just works.

author: UX_Critique
title: Too much friction
content: Creating a new group takes 6 steps. It should be one button. The UI feels very clunky for a modern app.

author: HappyCamper
title: Brilliant
content: I've tried every community app and Kindred is by far the most intuitive. The team clearly cares about user feedback.

author: BugHunter_99
title: Emoji bug
content: Using the 'rocket' emoji in a thread title causes the whole app to freeze and requires a force quit.

author: FeatureSeeker
title: Polls please!
content: It would be great if we could create polls within the groups to vote on meeting times or topics.

author: DisappointedUser
title: Font size is tiny
content: The text is so small I have to squint to read it. It doesn't respect the system font size settings on my iPhone.

author: AdBot_4000
title: Cheap Meds
content: Buy cheap medication online without prescription. Visit our site for 50% off today!

author: MamaBear
title: Safety first
content: I love the moderation tools. It makes me feel safe having my teenagers use this for their school clubs.

author: TechSupport_Hater
title: Support is non-existent
content: I emailed support about a billing issue 3 days ago and haven't heard back. The app is broken and nobody cares.

author: CleanLines
title: Great aesthetic
content: The visual design is top-notch. Just wish the 'Reply' button was a bit larger, I keep missing it.

author: PowerUser_X
title: Needs iPad optimization
content: It's just the iPhone app scaled up on iPad. Please make a proper iPadOS version with sidebar support.
